chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P.No.D-360 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 25.06.2025 Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w Aijaz Ali Mirani, Secretary, Market Committee, Shikarpur. ------ Pursuant to order dated 04.06.2025, Aijaz Ali Mirani, Secretary, Market Committee, Shikarpur effected appearance and filed joining report and authorization order dated 18.06.2025, taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the liability to pay arrears of pensionery benefits have been admitted by the respondents and drawn attention towards Order dated 12.03.2025. He further submits that total outstanding amount was required to pay by the respondents; however, due to retirement of the then secretary, the requisite cheques of arrears of every month from April, 2025 to June 2026 have been submitted before this Court, which have been lying to the Accountant of this Court. Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh submits that Aijaz Ali Mirani has recently been posted as Secretary, Market Committee, Shikarpur, his joining report and authorization order have been placed on record, therefore, he may sign the original cheques. Accordingly, cheques bearing No.47151499 dated 16.06.2025, 47151500 dated 15.07.2025, 47151501 dated 15.08.2025, 47151502 dated 15.09.2025, 47151503 dated 15.10.2025, 47151504 dated 14.11.2025, 47151505 dated 15.12.2025, 47151506 dated 15.01.2026, 47151507 dated 16.2.2026, 47151508 dated 16.03.2026, 47151509 dated 15.04.2026, 47151510 dated 15.05.2026 and 47151511 dated 15.06.2026 have been signed by Aijaz Ali Mirani, Secretary Market Committee, Shikarpur and have been handed over to the petitioner, who is present in Court under acknowledgement receipt.

Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh submits that Aijaz Ali Mirani has recently been posted as Secretary, Market Committee, Shikarpur, his joining report and authorization order have been placed on record, therefore, he may sign the original cheques. Accordingly, cheques bearing No.47151499 dated 16.06.2025, 47151500 dated 15.07.2025, 47151501 dated 15.08.2025, 47151502 dated 15.09.2025, 47151503 dated 15.10.2025, 47151504 dated 14.11.2025, 47151505 dated 15.12.2025, 47151506 dated 15.01.2026, 47151507 dated 16.2.2026, 47151508 dated 16.03.2026, 47151509 dated 15.04.2026, 47151510 dated 15.05.2026 and 47151511 dated 15.06.2026 have been signed by Aijaz Ali Mirani, Secretary Market Committee, Shikarpur and have been handed over to the petitioner, who is present in Court under acknowledgement receipt. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh has no objection. Since grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, therefore, instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Manzoor
